root.content: User demands DEEP investigation - not superficial planning. Must inventory ALL features, functionalities, logics, use-cases, user-journeys of entire HiveMind project including: mouse support, configurations, tabbed-views, diagrams, charts, viewports, reports, planning artifacts, swarm/agent/command/tool management, seeing actions in real-time.

children.content: Deep investigation COMPLETE. 8 parallel research agents inventoried ALL project capabilities: 14 tools (37 actions), 8 hooks, 25+ engines, 14 event types, 6 V1 components, 20+ OpenTUI components, 40+ OpenCode APIs, 8 agents. Created comprehensive inventory document at docs/plans/dashboard-v2-comprehensive-inventory-2026-02-26.md with 5-phase atomic execution plan for 10x dashboard improvement.
Research phase COMPLETE. Now entering Planning phase: Create atomic execution plans with validation gates, documentation, guardrails, and iterative loops for Dashboard-v2 overhaul.
Planning phase kickoff: orchestrate deep code-grounded inventory refresh and produce atomic Dashboard-v2 execution plan with gates, guardrails, docs, and iterative loops.
Drafting hierarchical Phase 0-9 execution master plan with strict loop model and anti-subdelegation contract.
User clarified this workstream is Phase 8 and requires strict delegation governance with absolute ban on sub-of-sub delegation. Main session retains orchestration control.
Executing /hivefiver research for Phase 8 only: produce orchestration architecture loop model and phase9 linkage without delegation or code edits.
Published dedicated Phase 8 loop architecture artifact with strict anti-subdelegation contract and Phase 9 hardening linkage at docs/plans/dashboard-v2-phase8-orchestration-loop-2026-02-26.md.
Phase 8 W1 packet generation from existing inventory/loop artifacts under no-subdelegation and no-new-research constraints.
W1 packet generated and validation evidence captured; dashboard-v2 bunx tsc gate failed with existing OpenTUI/JSX typing errors, requiring W1.delta retune before closeout.
Authoring W1.delta retune packet focused on dashboard-v2 OpenTUI/JSX TypeScript baseline failures under no-delegation/no-research constraints.

Published W1.delta retune packet at docs/plans/dashboard-v2-phase8-w1-delta-retune-2026-02-26.md with baseline error-class evidence and lane-based remediation gates (D1-D4) under no-delegation/no-research constraints.
Executing Phase 8 W1.delta lane D1: remediate dashboard-v2 OpenTUI/React import contract TS2305/TS2614 within strict 3-file scope

D1 complete: eliminated TS2305/TS2614 import-contract errors in dashboard-v2; entering D2 to resolve JSX namespace/props typing errors (TS2339/TS2322) under same no-delegation/no-research constraints.
Operating model aligned: main session coordinates Phase 8 end-to-end; single level-2 delegation allowed, strict ban on any sub-of-sub delegation remains enforced by anchor.
Phase 8 W1.delta builder task: fix dashboard-v2 TypeScript baseline errors in scoped files and verify compile/test gates
Verifying dashboard-v2 TypeScript fixes and compile/test gates after scoped file updates
Coordinator enforcing Phase 8 hierarchy: prepare context packet -> level-2 execute -> independent gate verification -> gate decision.
Gate decision complete: W1.delta passes after level-2 execution and independent gate verification; coordinator transitioning to next Phase 8 wave planning packet.
W2 packet published with high-level context preload and level-2 constraint-ready delegation contract; ready to dispatch W2.1 execution lane.
Executing Phase 8 W2.1 modal determinism in dashboard-v2 with scoped edits and full verification.
W2.1 implementation applied in dashboard-v2; running TypeScript and test verification gates.
W2.1 modal determinism implemented and verification gates passed for dashboard-v2 and repository.
W2.1 completed via level-2 execution with deterministic modal gating and independent gate verification passing (dashboard tsc, root tsc, npm test). Ready for W2.2 language toggle lane.
Executing W2.2 language toggle completeness in dashboard-v2 with scoped local edits and full verification gates
W2.2 language toggle completeness implemented and verification gates passing

W2.2 completed via level-2 execution with deterministic language toggle and persistence, with independent post-gate verification passing (dashboard tsc, root tsc, npm test). Preparing W2.3 help-overlay lane packet.
Dispatching W2.3 help-overlay lane: implement `?` key trigger, open/close behavior, conflict handling with modal focus and navigation

W2.3 Help Overlay lane COMPLETE. All 6 acceptance criteria met, all 3 gates pass (dashboard tsc, root tsc, npm test). Level-2 builder returned structured success with proper precedence chain (modal > help overlay > normal keys).
Major pivot: Dashboard-v2 component restructuring required. index.tsx at 969 LOC (3.2x over limit). Creating Phase 8 adjustment with new W0 Component Restructuring wave.

Phase 8 restructuring adjustment published at docs/plans/dashboard-v2-phase8-restructuring-adjustment-2026-02-26.md. W0 Component Restructuring wave added as blocking prerequisite for W3. W0.1-W0.5 lanes defined. Ready to dispatch W0.1 state extraction.
W0.1 State Extraction COMPLETE. state.ts created (123 LOC), index.tsx reduced 969→862 LOC (-11%). All 6 acceptance criteria met, all 3 gates pass. Ready for W0.2 panel extraction.
Previous W0.2 delegation call was interrupted by session disconnect before subagent execution completed. Marking blocked/acknowledged and preparing clean re-dispatch.
Executing clean W0.2 re-dispatch after interrupted run: leverage existing partial artifacts (constants + 4 panels), create missing 3 panels, and wire all 7 into MainPanel.
Execute W0.2 recovery: create 3 missing dashboard-v2 panels and wire all 7 panel components in MainPanel without UX/logic changes.
W0.2 recovery complete: 7 dashboard-v2 panels wired into MainPanel and inline render functions removed with verification gates passing.
W0.2 recovery complete: 7 dashboard-v2 panels wired into MainPanel and inline render functions removed with verification gates passing.
Preparing and dispatching W0.3 to extract MainPanel and HelpOverlay from index.tsx into components with behavior parity and gate verification.
Executing W0.3 extraction of MainPanel and HelpOverlay into components with behavior parity and verification.
W0.3 extraction complete: MainPanel and HelpOverlay moved to components, index.tsx slimmed and verified.
W0.3 complete: MainPanel and HelpOverlay extracted to components, index.tsx reduced to 395 LOC, verification gates pass.
Executing W0.4: extract dashboard-v2 polling and keyboard orchestration from index.tsx into useDashboardData and useKeyboardHandler hooks while preserving behavior.
W0.4 completed: extracted dashboard-v2 polling and keyboard orchestration into useDashboardData and useKeyboardHandler hooks; index.tsx now hook-wired with behavior parity maintained.
W0.4 complete: polling and keyboard orchestration extracted into useDashboardData and useKeyboardHandler hooks; index.tsx now 240 LOC with behavior parity and passing gates.
Finalizing W0 wave by reconciling master planning artifacts (phase loop, roadmap, milestones, transitions, gates, F/NF, edge cases) with verified execution evidence through W0.4.
Executing W0.5 docs-only reconciliation for dashboard-v2 planning artifacts with verified W0.1-W0.4 evidence
Action: Update three dashboard-v2 planning docs to mark W0.1-W0.4 complete with W0.5 closeout, gate evidence, and next transition W0 complete -> W2.4 -> W3 -> W4 -> W5
W0.5 completed: planning artifacts reconciled with verified evidence. W0 wave closed. Transition ready: W0 complete -> W2.4 -> W3 -> W4 -> W5.
Dispatching W2.4 with coordinator pattern: audit actual mouse capability, declare supported/unsupported paths, close interaction matrix, and encode defer obligations where needed.
W2.4 mouse capability audit and interaction matrix closeout docs update
W2.4 mouse capability audit and interaction matrix closeout docs update

W2.4 completed with partial-pass closeout: mouse lane audited as unsupported in current runtime, interaction matrix documented, Phase 9 defer obligations assigned, and W2 closeout encoded in planning artifacts.
Proceeding as planned into W3 kickoff: gather code-grounded observability surface map, draft W3 execution packet, and establish W3 pre-gate contract.

W3 docs-only kickoff packet published and orchestration loop updated to in-progress kickoff with pre-gate open.
W3 kickoff packet published and loop doc updated to in-progress pre-gate open. Proceeding to W3.1 contract lane execution (docs-first).

W3.1 swarm surface contract artifact published and W3 packet reflected with contract-published lane status.

Executing W3.3 docs-first TimeTravel surface contract artifact and reflecting W3.3 contract-published status into W3 packet/loop docs.

W3.4 ownership/event-map contract published (docs-only); dispatching W3.5 gate adjudication lane.
Execute W3.5 docs-only gate adjudication artifact and update W3 packet + orchestration loop for implementation kickoff.
Executing /hivefiver research deep-scan for W3.5 gate adjudication: inventory full HiveMind feature surface, user journeys, and real-time orchestration evidence across code + planning artifacts.
Deep-scan orchestration surface inventory across tools/hooks/lib/tests for W3.5 adjudication
Protocol correction: enforce zero sub-of-sub delegation and run lean docs-only evidence for W3.5 adjudication to unblock implementation kickoff.
